---
title: "Skiver Results: hq-illumina train"
jupyter: skiver
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  execute-dir: file
---

```{python}
SAMPLE_NAME = "hq-illumina"
SPLIT_NAME = "train"
RESULT_DIR = "../../skiver_run/hq-illumina/train"
```

{{< include skiver_results_template.qmd >}}
